message:
fix(ci): update configs for golangci-lint v2 and goreleaser v2

- Add version: "2" to golangci-lint config for v2 compatibility
- Migrate archives.format to archives.formats (list)
- Migrate format_overrides.format to format_overrides.formats (list)
- Migrate brews to homebrew_casks with binaries field
- Update Homebrew directory from Formula to Casks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -34,15 +34,17 @@ builds:
 
 archives:
   - id: default
-    format: tar.gz
+    formats:
+      - tar.gz
     name_template: >-
       {{ .ProjectName }}_
       {{- .Version }}_
       {{- .Os }}_
       {{- .Arch }}
     format_overrides:
       - goos: windows
-        format: zip
+        formats:
+          - zip
     files:
       - README*
       - PLAN_TO_MAKE_SLB.md
@@ -92,22 +94,18 @@ release:
   prerelease: auto
   name_template: "v{{.Version}}"
 
-brews:
+homebrew_casks:
   - name: slb
+    binaries:
+      - slb
     repository:
       owner: Dicklesworthstone
       name: homebrew-tap
       branch: main
       token: "{{ .Env.HOMEBREW_TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN }}"
-    directory: Formula
+    directory: Casks
     homepage: https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/slb
     description: "Simultaneous Launch Button - Two-person rule for dangerous commands"
-    license: MIT
-    install: |
-      bin.install "slb"
-      generate_completions_from_executable(bin/"slb", "completion")
-    test: |
-      system "#{bin}/slb", "version"
     caveats: |
       SLB (Simultaneous Launch Button) implements two-person authorization.
